hooks.command: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -Command "$L=\"$env:USERPROFILE\.claude\hooks.log\"; $T=(Get-Date -F 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'); Add-Content $L \"[$T] PreToolUse START\"; & .claude/hooks/run-pre.ps1; $c=$LASTEXITCODE; $T2=(Get-Date -F 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'); Add-Content $L \"[$T2] PreToolUse END exit=$c\"; exit $c"

powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -Command "$L=\"$env:USERPROFILE\.claude\hooks.log\"; $T=(Get-Date -F 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'); Add-Content $L \"[$T] PostToolUse(lint) START\"; node .claude/hooks/run-lint.mjs; $c=$LASTEXITCODE; $T2=(Get-Date -F 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'); Add-Content $L \"[$T2] PostToolUse(lint) END exit=$c\"; exit $c"

powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -Command "$L=\"$env:USERPROFILE\.claude\hooks.log\"; $T=(Get-Date -F 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'); Add-Content $L \"[$T] Stop(gitleaks) START\"; & .claude/hooks/run-stop.ps1; $c=$LASTEXITCODE; $T2=(Get-Date -F 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'); Add-Content $L \"[$T2] Stop(gitleaks) END exit=$c\"; exit $c"
